description_long: This seafood shop, named 'Fulton Fish Market', is a two-story building with a classical facade featuring prominent columns, a balcony with ornate black railings, and a decorative awning above the entrance. The ground floor has large bay windows with yellow panes, a red and gold awning, and a small green potted plant flanking the entrance. A display board with images of fish is set outside, and a small window box with flowers is visible on the upper floor. The building is painted in muted gray tones with black and brown roof elements, and the windows emit a warm yellow glow. The overall design suggests a historic or traditional urban commercial building, with subtle decorative touches and clear signage.
description: A two-story, gray classical seafood shop with a balcony, ornate awning, bay windows, and a prominent 'Fulton Fish Market' sign. Features include a fish display board, potted plant, and warm yellow-lit windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a red and gold awning, bay windows, balcony, storefront sign, potted plant, and fish display board.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing a window box with flowers on the upper floor, a side window, and a wall-mounted sign with text.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the building with minimal windows and architectural detailing, and a single upper window.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a single upper window with a red sill and a bay window on the lower floor.
attribute_storefront_signage: The storefront features a rectangular sign above the entrance with the text 'Fulton Fish Market' in elegant script, set on a muted brown background with black trim. The sign is centered above the red and gold decorative awning. There is also a display board on the sidewalk with images of fish, framed in gray, and a wall-mounted sign with text on the left side of the building.
attribute_displayed_seafood: The display board outside the entrance shows illustrations of various fish, including at least three distinct types, arranged side by side in a vertical format. No physical seafood is visible, only images.
attribute_architectural_style: The building exhibits a traditional urban commercial style with classical influences, including columns, a balcony with ornate railings, and decorative window and door frames.
